_comment: STUB — 2 of 25 rows. A content author must add 23 more rows before this fixture is usable. Categories still needed: anxiety, grief, gratitude, anger, shame, hope, awe, repentance, longing, illness, parenting, work, relationship, doubt, fear, joy, exhaustion, jealousy, faith-struggle, family-conflict, financial-stress, decision-paralysis, mortality, peace. See docs/qa/reflect-eval-design.md for the fixture shape + adjudication protocol.

phrase: I feel like nothing in my life makes sense right now

included_names.name: Al-Lateef
included_names.why: the gentle one whose plan unfolds invisibly

included_names.name: Al-Hakeem
included_names.why: the wise — every event has a reason

included_names.name: Al-Khabeer
included_names.why: the aware — sees what we can't

rationale.excluded_pattern: Names of power/strength (Al-Qawi, Al-Aziz) — phrase is about confusion, not weakness

phrase: I'm scared no one understands what I'm going through

rationale.excluded_pattern: Forgiveness Names (Al-Ghaffar, At-Tawwab) — phrase is about being seen, not about sin
